content.description:
Hobson's bootloader and kernel recognize several URL query parameters that control startup behavior and debugging.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Values | Purpose |
|-----------|--------|--------|
| `?safe=1` | `1` | Boot in [safe mode](item://c0c0c0c0-0007-0000-0000-000000000000) — kernel only, no user code items loaded. Shows import UI for recovery. |
| `?debug` | (flag) | Enable debug mode. Activates DOM attribution (`data-view-id`, `data-for-item`, `data-source`, `data-source-line`) and auto-loads the [element inspector](item://c0c0c0c0-0026-0000-0000-000000000000) on boot. |
| `?perf=1` | `1` | Enable performance instrumentation. Records boot stage timings via `window.hobsonPerf`. Call `hobsonPerf.summary()` in the REPL to see a color-coded timeline. |
| `?instance=<id>` | UUID | Boot a [nested instance](item://c0c0c0c0-0002-0000-0000-000000000000). All storage keys are prefixed with `<id>:` for isolation. Multiple instances share one IndexedDB but are namespaced. |

## Usage Examples

```
hobson.html?safe=1              Safe mode recovery
hobson.html?debug               Debug with inspector
hobson.html?perf=1              Profile boot performance
hobson.html?instance=abc123     Nested instance
hobson.html?safe=1&debug        Combined: safe mode + debug
```

## Notes

- `?safe=1` can also be triggered at runtime via **Ctrl+Shift+S** keyboard shortcut
- `?debug` mode adds `data-*` attributes to all rendered DOM elements for tracing which view and item produced each element
- `?perf=1` measures: IndexedDB open, kernel-core load, module imports, view renders, markdown parsing, transclusions, and query block execution
- `?instance` enables running multiple isolated Hobson environments in different browser tabs or nested iframes

## See Also

- [Bootstrap](item://c0c0c0c0-0002-0000-0000-000000000000) — Boot process that reads these parameters
- [Safe Mode](item://c0c0c0c0-0007-0000-0000-000000000000) — Recovery workflows
- [Element Inspector](item://c0c0c0c0-0026-0000-0000-000000000000) — Debug mode tooling
- [REPL](item://c0c0c0c0-0008-0000-0000-000000000000) — `hobsonPerf.summary()` for perf results
